items.claim: Gandra has 100% takedown defense in his UFC career.
Gandra's 100% takedown defense is unproven because he has not fought for a full round in the UFC.
items.quote: this is just in two UFC fights where he's finished both of his opponents in the first round... So, he hasn't even been in the octagon for a total of one round in the UFC.
